title: Xtra Crispy Croatian Tofu Skewers
description: A tangy and flaky Croatian dish featuring tofu, perfect for a crowd, and keto-friendly, cooked to perfection on a yakimono-grill.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated tofu onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the tofu skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until crispy and golden brown.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last minute of grilling.
Remove the skewers from the grill and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
